creator: mezz@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

We normal don't want to maintain any unoffical patches on our own unless we 
have to. After looked at a few of bugzilla and mailing list, it's not complete 
ready and they are still tweaking. These libraries are maintaining very well 
by upstream, so when patches are ready and these will be in the release 
tarball.
